title: cyperus hermaphroditus var. angustior
intro: Cyperus hermaphroditus var. angustior, also known as Cyperus angustior, is a variant of the Cyperus hermaphroditus plant, which belongs to the sedge family. This aquatic plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cyperus angustior include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support kidney function. In herbal preparations, Cyperus angustior is often used to make infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although its use should be guided by a medical professional.
